quotes.quote: This initial review, which doesn’t use external tools like web search, aims to quickly discard flawed, non-novel, or otherwise unsuitable hypotheses.
quotes.rationale: A screening filter that discards candidates before later stages, judged without external tools.

quotes.quote: The Reflection agent searches relevant prior work (via web search or a dedicated scientist-provided repository), assesses existing experimental evidence for or against a given hypothesis, and rigorously verifies the novelty, correctness, and quality of generated outputs.
quotes.rationale: Named reviewing agent judging novelty, correctness and quality using retrieved prior work.

quotes.quote: Context memory. In order to enable iterative computation and scientific reasoning over long time horizons, the co-scientist uses a persistent context memory to store and retrieve states of the agents and the system during the course of the computation.
quotes.rationale: Agent and system states, including review outputs, persist in context memory.

quotes.quote: Note that the Elo metric is auto-evaluated and not based on independent ground truth.
quotes.rationale: The ranking signal is self-generated, without independent ground truth.

quotes.quote: Evolution agent. The co-scientist’s iterative improvement capability relies heavily on this agent, which continuously refines the top-ranked hypotheses emerging from the tournament.
quotes.rationale: Tournament rank steers which candidates are refined, so the ranking controls the search.

quotes.quote: The co-scientist’s hypotheses for these three settings are externally, independently validated by in vitro laboratory experiments and detailed in separate preprints co-timed with this work.
quotes.rationale: Independent wet-lab validation reported outside the system loop.

quotes.quote: This work does not aim to completely automate the scientific process with AI. Instead, the co-scientist is purpose-built for a “scientist-in-the-loop” collaborative paradigm, to help domain experts augment their hypothesis generation process and guide the exploration that follows.
quotes.rationale: Domain experts guide the exploration, giving humans a steering role over the loop.

diagnostics.consequence: Closed computational feedback is driven by an unvalidated self-assessment, so apparent improvement may reflect optimization of the internal metric rather than genuine hypothesis quality.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Note that the Elo metric is auto-evaluated and not based on independent ground truth.
Evolution agent. The co-scientist’s iterative improvement capability relies heavily on this agent, which continuously refines the top-ranked hypotheses emerging from the tournament.

diagnostics.statement: The tournament Elo ranking that drives search control and evolutionary refinement is self-generated by the system and is explicitly stated not to rest on independent ground truth.

diagnostics.consequence: Irreversible stage-transition rejections rest on an unmeasured filter; false rejections of novel hypotheses cannot be bounded from the packet.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: This initial review, which doesn’t use external tools like web search, aims to quickly discard flawed, non-novel, or otherwise unsuitable hypotheses.

The Reflection agent searches relevant prior work (via web search or a dedicated scientist-provided repository), assesses existing experimental evidence for or against a given hypothesis, and rigorously verifies the novelty, correctness, and quality of generated outputs.

diagnostics.statement: No reliability study is reported for the LLM review channels: the initial screen discards candidates for non-novelty and flaws without external tools, and the Reflection agent's novelty/correctness verification carries no reported discrimination or agreement evidence.

diagnostics.consequence: The only physical-fidelity evidence is external-only and cannot close the loop, so within-source closure remains dependent on self-assessment.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: The co-scientist’s hypotheses for these three settings are externally, independently validated by in vitro laboratory experiments and detailed in separate preprints co-timed with this work.
Importantly, this example does not aim to suggest potential therapeutic avenues for ALS and should be interpreted with utmost caution.

diagnostics.statement: Independent in vitro validation is reported only in separate co-timed preprints and is not routed back into the system's loop, and the packet itself cautions against interpreting example outputs as actionable.

diagnostics.consequence: Role-specific oversight cannot be coded with confidence, so accountability for admitted memory states and policy changes is indeterminate.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: This work does not aim to completely automate the scientific process with AI. Instead, the co-scientist is purpose-built for a “scientist-in-the-loop” collaborative paradigm, to help domain experts augment their hypothesis generation process and guide the exploration that follows.

Context memory. In order to enable iterative computation and scientific reasoning over long time horizons, the co-scientist uses a persistent context memory to store and retrieve states of the agents and the system during the course of the computation.

diagnostics.statement: Human authority is described only as a general "scientist-in-the-loop" paradigm, without specifying who approves, selects, or holds final authority over validator outputs, memory contents, or policy.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Note that the Elo metric is auto-evaluated and not based on independent ground truth.
The co-scientist’s hypotheses for these three settings are externally, independently validated by in vitro laboratory experiments and detailed in separate preprints co-timed with this work.

recommendations.proposed_action: Anchor the tournament Elo signal against an independent criterion by reporting, for a held-out set of ranked hypotheses, the correspondence between internal Elo and the external in vitro outcomes already obtained.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Rank agreement exceeds a pre-registered chance baseline on a held-out hypothesis set
success_check.evidence_needed: A property-specific external validation table linking Elo ranks to wet-lab measurements
success_check.observable: Reported association between internal Elo rank and independently measured in vitro outcome for the same hypotheses

exact_quotes.exact_quote: This initial review, which doesn’t use external tools like web search, aims to quickly discard flawed, non-novel, or otherwise unsuitable hypotheses.

The Reflection agent searches relevant prior work (via web search or a dedicated scientist-provided repository), assesses existing experimental evidence for or against a given hypothesis, and rigorously verifies the novelty, correctness, and quality of generated outputs.

recommendations.proposed_action: Run and report a discrimination study for the tool-free initial screen, measuring how often hypotheses it discards as flawed or non-novel are judged acceptable by the full prior-art-grounded Reflection review or by domain experts.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Reported with confidence intervals and compared to a no-screen control
success_check.evidence_needed: A labeled sample of screened-out hypotheses with reference adjudication
success_check.observable: False-rejection rate of the initial screen against a reference novelty and correctness label

exact_quotes.exact_quote: This work does not aim to completely automate the scientific process with AI. Instead, the co-scientist is purpose-built for a “scientist-in-the-loop” collaborative paradigm, to help domain experts augment their hypothesis generation process and guide the exploration that follows.

Context memory. In order to enable iterative computation and scientific reasoning over long time horizons, the co-scientist uses a persistent context memory to store and retrieve states of the agents and the system during the course of the computation.

recommendations.proposed_action: Document, per role, which decisions the scientist in the loop can initiate, approve, or override, including admission of states into the persistent context memory.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Every role assigned exactly one observable authority level with a supporting textual description
success_check.evidence_needed: System documentation or interaction logs showing where human approval is required
success_check.observable: An explicit role-by-authority table covering generator, executor, validator, memory, and policy

memory_structure: persistent context memory storing and retrieving agent and system states across long horizons
policy_type: multi-agent hypothesis generation with tournament-based ranking
